calendar.matters:
Name Change In Scd 218 At 09:00 A.M. On June 24, 2003.
Off Calendar Jun-24-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR. Brenda Fields.
Petitioner, Jo Lil Howard present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to Josephine Lillian Howard.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-10-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Joe Vickstein. There being no appearance, the matter is ordered off calendar.
